form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 2nd of 9 at this track on March 28 over 1200m, 7 len behind Red Warrior with 55kg at $5. Previously second-up ran last of 12 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on August 8 over 1200m, slow going 9 len behind Trapdoor carrying 58kg at $61. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.
